summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: Nothing's flagging on the usual watch areas today — knees, joints, shoulders, neck all feel quiet, so there's no reason to baby anything if you train. You're built to recover through steadiness and repetition rather than big peaks and crashes, and today fits that mold cleanly — you slept a little longer than you've been getting and your system came in calm and ready, no jagged edges.

Performance: Train normally. You came in a touch above your usual recovery, so it's a solid day to put real work in — make it resistance work if you can, since that's what actually moves the needle for you, and don't be shy about going heavier than steps.

Transit: none
